title: Major auction house withdraws modern collection after provenance questions
body: A major auction house withdrew a high-value modern art collection after new provenance questions and restitution claims surfaced. Advisors said the decision may reshape diligence expectations for private sales and estate consignments. The disputed works were connected to cross-border movement records now under investigation.

title: Provenance dispute forces withdrawal of high-value modern art collection
body: A high-value modern art collection was withdrawn before auction after provenance questions and restitution concerns emerged. The development increases reputational risk for advisors handling private sales, estate consignments, and cross-border transfers.

title: Sotheby's expands private sales advisory for family offices in Asia
body: Sotheby's announced an expanded private sales advisory desk for family offices in Asia, citing rising demand from new collectors and wealth management partners. The move includes lower introductory advisory fees and a digital platform for client intake.

title: EU officials advance stricter anti-money laundering checks for high-value art
body: European officials advanced stricter anti-money laundering reporting requirements for high-value art transactions. The proposal would require additional beneficial ownership checks, customs records, and risk documentation for cross-border sales.

title: Latin America collector demand lifts contemporary art private sales
body: Private sales teams reported growth in Latin America collector demand for contemporary art and design objects. Advisors said new collectors are seeking discreet entry points below marquee evening-sale levels, creating a market entry opportunity for trusted intermediaries.

title: SEC inquiry targets fractional art investment fund disclosures
body: An SEC inquiry is examining whether a fractional art investment fund adequately disclosed valuation methods, conflicts, and liquidity risk. Compliance attorneys said the investigation could affect wealth management referrals into collectibles-backed products.

title: Shipping delays hit cross-border consignments ahead of spring auctions
body: Customs delays and logistics bottlenecks are affecting cross-border consignments before spring auctions. Specialists warned that late arrivals may force catalogue changes, reserve renegotiations, or private sales alternatives for high-value works.

title: Christie's tests lower commission tier for emerging collectors
body: Christie's is testing a lower commission tier for emerging collectors in selected categories. The pilot includes digital onboarding, advisory bundles, and referral partnerships with wealth managers.
